title: crux_core-v0.18.0
description: crux_core v0.18.0 - 2026-05-08 🚀 Features Fluent effect test assertions : The #[effect] macro (from crux_macros ) now generates a Effect TestExt trait on Command Effect, Event with fluent, chainable assertion and resolution methods per effect variant: expect_ effect ( mut self) - mut Self — assert the next effect is of this type and chain expect_ effect _with( mut self, |op| ...) - mut Self — assert and inspect the operation expect_only_ effect ( mut self) — assert this is the only remaining effect or event expect_only_ effect _with( mut self, |op| ...) — assert, inspect, and assert done resolve_ effect ( mut self, |op| output) - mut Self — assert, resolve, and chain then_event( mut self, |ev| ...) - mut Self — assert and inspect the next event These helpers are compiled in only when the t
summary_ja: crux_core v0.18.0では、#[effect]マクロが生成するTestExt traitにより、Effectの流暢でチェーン可能なアサーションメソッド（expect_、resolve_など）が追加され、エフェクトテストが記述しやすくなりました。これらのヘルパーはテストビルド時のみコンパイルされます。
